component.name: GameDock
component.summary: Android gaming on Linux, made seamless

description.p: GameDock is an open-source Android gaming platform for Linux. It provides a seamless experience for running Android games on Linux through Waydroid, with features like automatic runtime management, controller support, game library organization, and system optimization.

ul.li: One-click APK, XAPK, APKS, APKM installation
Game library with icons, metadata, and search
Controller support for Xbox, DualSense, Switch Pro, and more
